versions.summary: Senior Frontend Angular Developer with 4+ years building high-performance, accessible web applications for government and enterprise clients. Expert in Angular, TypeScript, RxJS, and modern web standards.
highlights: Proficient in TypeScript, RxJS, Angular Signals, and reactive patterns
Expert in web accessibility (WCAG 2.1) and performance optimization
Built immigration portals, pension platforms serving 10,000+ users
Strong foundation in Ionic cross-platform mobile development

versions.summary: Full Stack Developer with 4+ years enterprise experience across Angular frontend, Node.js/Express backend, and deployment infrastructure. Skilled in building end-to-end solutions with TypeScript across the stack.
highlights: Frontend: Angular 2-18, TypeScript, RxJS, Tailwind CSS
Backend: Node.js, Express, REST APIs, database design
DevOps: Docker, cloud deployment, CI/CD pipelines
Full-stack project delivery for government and financial sectors
Database optimization and query performance tuning

versions.summary: Senior Freelance Developer available for contract work. Specialized in Angular, Ionic, and end-to-end web development. Proven track record delivering projects on time for startups and enterprises.
highlights: Available for immediate engagement on contract projects
Fixed-price and time & materials models available
Rapid project turnaround with high-quality deliverables
Experience with startups and Fortune 500 companies
Can scale to team leads for larger engagements
